provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring civilization, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, tall imposing reptilian alien with dark green-grey overlapping scales scarred white from dozens of fights across the snout and chest, a prominent bony crest ridge from heavy brow ridges to the crown bearing three filed notch-marks indicating kills, fierce amber slit-pupil eyes under scarred brow plates, lipless jaw clenched showing worn teeth, barrel chest with aggressive forward lean, thick powerful tail held high and scarred at the base where two scales are missing from an old wound, wearing heavy master-forged dark bronze plate armor shaped to follow the natural scale ridges with visible forge hammer marks and deliberate imperfections left by the house smith, each dent and repair on the armor represents a specific fight, a faded crimson house sash knotted at the waist over dark cured leather underpadding stained with conditioning oil and old sweat, bronze vambraces dented and scratched on both forearms, a belt of metal honor tokens some clearly taken from defeated opponents, a heavy straight-bladed sword in a battered leather sheath at the hip with a house seal on the pommel
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
